---
title: "R_analisis"
author: "Ismael Joaquín Borreguero Vázquez"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r paquetes, include=FALSE}
###se  cargan todos los paquetes
library(glmmTMB)
library(performance)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(itsadug)
library(gratia)
library(data.table)
library(moments)
library(tidyverse)
library(readODS)
library(readxl)
library(patchwork)
library(lme4)
library(effects)
library(sjPlot)
library(lmerTest)
library(visreg)
library(car)
library(SPEI)
library(lmtest)
library(multcompView)
library(cowplot)
library(merTools)
library(plyr)
library(gamm4)
library(DHARMa)
library(MuMIn) ###para seleccionar modelo
source("Anatomy_function.R")
```

```{r datos, include=FALSE}
###clima
clima <- list()

clima$prp <- read_csv("Gamirprcp2019-2022.csv")

Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21 <- read_excel("Gamir_Nov20_Feb21.xlsx")
Temp_gamir_Feb21_Jun21 <- read_excel("Gamir_Feb21_Jun21.xlsx")
Temp_gamir_Jun21_May22 <- read_excel("Gamir_Jun21_May22.xlsx")
###le doy el formato de fecha
Temp_gamir_Feb21_Jun21$date <- as.Date( Temp_gamir_Feb21_Jun21$`Fecha/hora (CET)`, "%m/%d/%y")
Temp_gamir_Jun21_May22$date <- as.Date( Temp_gamir_Jun21_May22$`Fecha/hora (CET)`, "%y/%m/%d")
###me quedo con la humedad relativa y la temperatura
Temp_gamir_Feb21_May22 <- rbind(Temp_gamir_Feb21_Jun21,Temp_gamir_Jun21_May22)  
Temp_gamir_Feb21_May22 <- Temp_gamir_Feb21_May22[names(Temp_gamir_Feb21_May22) %in% c("date" ,"Temperatura_(C)", "Humedad_relativa")]

####le hago la media de temperatura al df Temp_gamir_Feb21_Jun21
Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21$Tmean <- rowMeans(Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21[, c("Tmin","Tmax")] , na.rm = T)
Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21$date <- as.Date(Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21$date)


clima$temp <- Temp_gamir_Feb21_May22
clima$temp_Feb21  <- Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21

#Humedad suelo
clima$Hum <- read_delim("Humedad_suelo_Modificado.csv", delim = ";" )


rm(Temp_gamir_Nov20_Feb21, Temp_gamir_Feb21_Jun21, Temp_gamir_Jun21_May22, Temp_gamir_Feb21_May22 )

###EW/LW/TRW/Area
Minicore_fielddata <- list()
Minicore_fielddata$Minicore_TRW <- read_excel_allsheets("Datos_Modificados_Qca.xlsx")
Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie <- read_ods("Datos_Pie.ods")
Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie <- split(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie, Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie$Especie)
Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie <- Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie$QUCA

# setwd("C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/a4-02-2021")
# name_documents <- list.files(pattern = '*.csv') ##hace una lista con todos los nombres de archivos csv de la carpeta
# Qca2020_21 <- list()
# Qca2020_21$Qca20 <- lapply(name_documents, read_delim, delim = ',') #se abren los documentos seleccionados
# names(Qca2020_21$Qca20) <- name_documents #conecta los nombre de la lista con los nombres de los documentos
# setwd("C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/l19-1-2022")
# name_documents <- list.files(pattern = '*.csv') ##hace una lista con todos los nombres de archivos csv de la carpeta
# Qca2020_21$Qca21 <- lapply(name_documents, read_delim, delim = ',') #se abren los documentos seleccionados
# names(Qca2020_21$Qca21) <- name_documents #conecta los nombre de la lista con los nombres de los documentos
# rm(name_documents)

Qca2020_21 <- readRDS("Qca2020_21.rds")

###patogenos
Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora <- read_xlsx("Patogenos_y_textura.xlsx", sheet = "Gamir")

# vessel_imageJ <- readRDS("vessel_Data.rds") ########datos de todos los vasos de imageJ
new_vess <- read_excel_allsheets("Tabla_Nvasosnuevos.xlsx")
```

```{r clima, include=FALSE}
###creo una lista para meter los gráficos
clima_plot <- list()

#######Temperatura y VPD

temperatura <- clima$temp 

##calculo el SPD y el AVP
temperatura$SVP <- 0.6108 * exp((17.27 * temperatura$`Temperatura_(C)`) / (temperatura$`Temperatura_(C)` + 237.3))
temperatura$AVP <-  temperatura$SVP * (temperatura$Humedad_relativa / 100)
temperatura$VPD <-  temperatura$SVP - temperatura$AVP

##hago la media diaria de los valores de temperatura, humedad, maximo y minimo de temperatura diaria
temperatura <- split(temperatura, temperatura$date)
temperatura <- lapply(temperatura, function(x){
  df <-  data.frame("Tmean" = mean(x$`Temperatura_(C)`), "Tmin" = min(x$`Temperatura_(C)`), "Tmax" = max(x$`Temperatura_(C)`), "VPD" = mean(x$VPD) )
})
x <- 0
while(x < length(temperatura)){
  x <- x +1
  temperatura[[x]]$date <- names(temperatura[x])
}
rm(x)
temperatura <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame,temperatura ) )

temperatura$date <- as.Date(temperatura$date)

clima$VPD <- data.frame("date" = temperatura$date, "VPD" = temperatura$VPD)
temperatura$VPD <- NULL 

##ahora uno ambas temperaturas

clima$temp <- rbind(clima$temp_Feb21 ,temperatura)
clima$temp_Feb21 <- NULL

###sectorizo  las fechas tanto de prp como de temperatura


clima <- lapply(clima, function(x){
  ifelse("date" %in% names(x), x <-  x[x$date >= as.Date("2020-11-01") & x$date <= as.Date("2022-02-28"),], x <- x )  
              return(x)})

clima$prp$date <- as.Date(clima$prp$date)
precipitacion <- clima$prp
precipitacion <- precipitacion[names(precipitacion) %in% c("date","Prcp")]

precipitacion$year_month <- format(precipitacion$date, "%Y-%m")

group_month <- aggregate(Prcp ~ year_month, data = precipitacion, sum)
group_month$date <- as.Date(paste(group_month$year_month,'-01',sep = "")) 


###total de precipitacion
sum(precipitacion$Prcp)


##grafico precipitacion
precipitacion$doy <- yday(precipitacion$date)

clima_plot$prp <- ggplot()+
  geom_bar(data=precipitacion, aes(date, as.numeric(Prcp)),stat = "identity",
           show.legend = FALSE,position = "dodge", fill= "#00BFFF")+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"))+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = " ")+
  ylab("precipitation (mm)")+
  xlab(" ")





###figura 2

temperatura <- clima$temp

clima_plot$temp <-  ggplot() + geom_line(data=temperatura, aes(as.Date(date, "%y/%m/%d"), Tmean), color = "black", lwd= 0.9)+
geom_line(data=temperatura, aes(as.Date(date, "%y/%m/%d"), Tmax), color = "#FF3030", lwd= 0.9)+
  geom_line(data=temperatura, aes(as.Date(date, "%y/%m/%d"), Tmin), color = "#1C86EE", lwd= 0.9)+
  scale_y_continuous(name="Temperature (ºC)",breaks= c(-5,0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35,40),
                     expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = " ")+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"))+
  xlab(" ")


####Humedad suelo

Hum_suelo <- clima$Hum

Hum_suelo <- split(Hum_suelo, Hum_suelo$Site)
Hum_suelo <- Hum_suelo$Gamir
nombre_columnas_fecha <- names(Hum_suelo)  ##cojo los nombres de la humedad de suelo (las fechas)
nombre_columnas_fecha <- nombre_columnas_fecha[!(nombre_columnas_fecha %in% c("Site", "Plot","Point","Treatment","Depth")) ]#elimino las variables que no contemplo para este plot

Hum_suelo <- reshape2::melt(Hum_suelo, id.vars=c("Site", "Plot","Point","Treatment","Depth"), 
                     measure.vars= nombre_columnas_fecha, 
                     value.name="values", 
                     variable.name="date")

##veo como se comportan las variables

Hum_suelo$site_tr <- paste0(Hum_suelo$Site, "_", Hum_suelo$Treatment)
ggplot(data= Hum_suelo, aes(x= as.Date(date, format = "%d/%m/%Y"), y= as.numeric(values), color= site_tr))+
  geom_point()+
  facet_grid(. ~ Depth)+
  geom_smooth()+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,60))


Hum_suelo$date <- as.Date(Hum_suelo$date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")
Hum_suelo$date1 <- as.numeric(Hum_suelo$date)
Hum_suelo$values <- as.numeric(Hum_suelo$values)
Hum_suelo$Depth <- as.factor(Hum_suelo$Depth)
Hum_suelo$Plot <- as.factor(Hum_suelo$Plot)
Hum_suelo$Treatment <- as.factor(Hum_suelo$Treatment)
Hum_suelo$Depth_point <- paste0(Hum_suelo$Point, "_", Hum_suelo$Depth)


Hum_suelo[duplicated(Hum_suelo[, c("Plot", "Point", "date1")]), ]

modelo_humedad <- gamm4(values ~ Treatment * Depth + s(date1, k = 10),
     random = ~(1|Plot/Point),
     data = Hum_suelo)

###duda si es el random Point o el Point_depth


summary(modelo_humedad$gam)


residuos <- residuals(modelo_humedad$mer)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)
hist(residuos) ###son normales
plot(modelo_humedad$mer)

###le hago el predict al modelo
predict_Humedad <- get_predictions(modelo_humedad$gam, 
                       cond = list( Depth = rep( unique(Hum_suelo$Depth), length(unique(Hum_suelo$date1))),
                                    date1= rep(unique(Hum_suelo$date1), each=8),
                                    Treatment= rep(unique(Hum_suelo$Treatment), each=4),
                                    Plot = 1,
                                    Point = 1, se= T))


predict_Humedad <- unique(predict_Humedad)

clima_plot$Hum <-  ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = Hum_suelo, aes(x= as.Date(Hum_suelo$date1), y= as.numeric(values), colour= Treatment), alpha= 0.1, show.legend = F)+
  geom_line(data= predict_Humedad, aes(x= as.Date(date1), y= fit, colour = Treatment), lwd=0.9, show.legend = F)+
  facet_grid(. ~ Depth)+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  geom_ribbon(data= predict_Humedad, alpha=.3, mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date1), ymin= fit-CI, ymax= fit +CI, fill=Treatment),colour= NA, show.legend = F)+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
  labs( x= " ", y = "soil moisture (%)")


###SPEI
 

clima$temp$PET <- hargreaves(Tmin=clima$temp$Tmin, Tmax=clima$temp$Tmax, lat= 36.569 )

clima$temp$prp <- clima$prp$Prcp

Prp_PET <- clima$temp$prp - clima$temp$PET

clima$SPEI <- spei(Prp_PET, scale =1 )

clima$SPEI <- data.frame(
  time = seq.Date(from = as.Date("2020-11-01"), by = "day", length.out = length(clima$SPEI$fitted)),
  spei = clima$SPEI$fitted
)


clima$SPEI$sing <- ifelse(as.numeric(clima$SPEI$spei) >= 0, "pos", "neg") 

clima_plot$SPEI <-  ggplot(clima$SPEI, aes(x = time, y = spei, col = sing, fill = sing)) +
  geom_bar(show.legend = F, stat = "identity") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("pos" = "darkblue", "neg" = "red")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("pos"  = "darkblue", "neg" = "red")) +
  labs( x= " ", y = "SPEI") +
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"))+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")

##VPD

clima_plot$prp <- ggplot()+
  geom_line(data = clima$VPD, aes(x=date, y=VPD*10), color= "black", lwd=0.7, linetype= 8)+
  geom_bar(data=clima$prp, aes(date, as.numeric(Prcp)),stat = "identity",
           show.legend = FALSE,position = "dodge", fill= "#00BFFF")+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y.left = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.line.y.right = element_line(colour="black" ))+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = " ")+
  scale_y_continuous(sec.axis = sec_axis(~(./10),name="VPD (Kpa)",breaks= c(1,2,3,4)),
                     name = "precipitation (mm)",breaks = c(0,10,20,30,40), expand = c(0,0))+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")

##Plots


plot_grid(clima_plot$temp,clima_plot$prp, clima_plot$Hum, ncol = 1)
clima_plot$SPEI

```

```{r Phenology canariensis_EW, include=FALSE}

##########PREGUNTA: ¿Hay cambios en la temporalidad de inicio de la EW?
Qca_phenology <- Minicore_fielddata$Minicore_TRW
Qca_phenology <- Qca_phenology[ names(Qca_phenology) != "ray_area"]


 ###elimino las columnas y las fechas que no son interesantes para este analisis
Qca_phenology <- lapply(Qca_phenology, function(x){
  if( !(("Inicio_EW" %in% names(x)) | ("Inicio_LW" %in% names(x)))) {return(NULL)}
  return(x)
})
Qca_phenology <- Qca_phenology[!sapply(Qca_phenology, is.null)]

Qca_phenology <- lapply(Qca_phenology, function(x) x[(names(x) %in% c("Plot", "Tratam", "indv","Inicio_EW", "Inicio_LW"))])

##añadimos una columna con las fechas del muestreo 
fechas <- c("02/02/2021", "18/03/2021","01/04/2021","15/04/2021","29/04/2021","13/05/2021","27/05/2021" ,"10/06/2021","22/07/2021","10/08/2021")
Qca_phenology <- mapply(cbind, Qca_phenology, "date"=as.Date(fechas, "%d/%m/%Y" ), SIMPLIFY=F)


####junto datos de pie a individuo
Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie <- Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie[!names(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie) %in% c("Especie", "Finca","Tratam","Plot")]
names(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie)[names(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie) == 'Árbol'] <- 'indv'

Qca_phenology <- lapply(Qca_phenology, function(x) {x <- merge(x,Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie, by=c("indv"))
 if(!( "Inicio_LW" %in% names(x))){x$Inicio_LW <- NA}
 if(!("Inicio_EW" %in% names(x))){x$Inicio_EW <- NA}
return(x)
})

Qca_phenology <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame, Qca_phenology))

####empezamos a hacer el analisis de EW y LW

Qca_phenology$Inicio_EW <- as.factor(tolower(Qca_phenology$Inicio_EW))
Qca_phenology$Inicio_LW <- as.factor(tolower(Qca_phenology$Inicio_LW))
Qca_phenology$date_1 <- yday(Qca_phenology$date) ##se reformula la fecha en DOY
Qca_phenology$Tratam <- as.factor(Qca_phenology$Tratam)
Qca_phenology$Plot <- as.factor(Qca_phenology$Plot)
Qca_phenology$indv <- as.factor(Qca_phenology$indv)
Qca_phenology$Inicio_EW_bin <- ifelse(Qca_phenology$Inicio_EW == "si", 1, 0)
Qca_phenology$Inicio_LW_bin <- ifelse(Qca_phenology$Inicio_LW == "si", 1, 0)
####veo si hay colinealidad en mis variables
df <- data.frame("DBH"= Qca_phenology$DBH_.cm. , "H"= Qca_phenology$H_.cm. , "Dcopa"= Qca_phenology$Diametro_copa_.cm. )
cor(df)
summary(lm(formula = DBH ~ ., data = df)) #####correlacionado el H con el DBH, por lo tanto elijo la altura como variables
rm(df)
####mirar correlacion temporal correlation = corAR1(form = ~ as.numeric(date1) | Plot) esta forma

##modelos ########mirar con ELI pongo solo Plot ya que PLOT recoge casi toda la variabilidad
Qca_phenology_EW <- split(Qca_phenology, Qca_phenology$Inicio_EW_bin)
Qca_phenology_EW <- rbind(Qca_phenology_EW$`0`, Qca_phenology_EW$`1`)############Elimino los NA de esta columna


##########me sigue generando errores. Solo me converge con indv como random, deberiamos de revisarlo juntos.  Por ahora pongo solo indv como random
###Para responder la pregunta, usaria el modelo 5 ¿Que opinais?


# modelo1 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_EW, Inicio_EW_bin ~ date_1 + H_.cm. + Diametro_copa_.cm. + Tratam + (1|indv),  family = binomial) ##29.0
# modelo2 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_EW, Inicio_EW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.)+ Tratam  + (1|indv), family = binomial) ##36.9
# modelo3 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_EW, Inicio_EW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(H_.cm.)+ Tratam  + (1|indv) , family = binomial)
# modelo4 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_EW, Inicio_EW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(H_.cm.)*scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.)+ Tratam  + + (1|indv), family = binomial) ##35.4 
modelo5 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_EW, Inicio_EW_bin ~ scale(date_1) +Tratam +(1|indv)  , family = binomial) #30.2
#########no me converge el modelo 1 y el 4, por lo cual no los utilizaré

# model.sel(modelo1, modelo2, modelo3, modelo5) ###mejor modelo es el modelo 1


r2(modelo5)
summary(modelo5)
residuos <- residuals(modelo5)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)
hist(residuos) ###son normales

#####graficarlo

df <- expand.grid(
  Tratam = levels(Qca_phenology$Tratam),
  H_.cm. = mean(Qca_phenology$H_.cm., na.rm=TRUE),
  Diametro_copa_.cm. = mean(Qca_phenology$Diametro_copa_.cm., na.rm=TRUE),
  date_1 = seq(min(Qca_phenology$date_1), max(Qca_phenology$date_1), length.out = 100),
  indv= 5,
  Plot = 1
)


predict_Ci <- predictInterval(modelo5,
                              newdata = df,
                              level = 0.95,
                              type = "probability",
                              stat = "mean")

df$fit <- predict_Ci$fit
df$upr <- predict_Ci$upr
df$lwr <- predict_Ci$lwr
plot_EWformation <- ggplot(data = df, aes(x = date_1, y=fit, colour = Tratam ))+
  geom_line(show.legend = F, lwd= 0.7)+
  geom_ribbon(data= df, alpha=.3, mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date_1), ymin= lwr, ymax= upr, fill=Tratam),colour= NA, show.legend = F)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(30,150), breaks = seq(from=40, to=160, by=20))+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
  labs( x= "DOY", y = "EW vessel formation probability")+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0),limits = c(0,1.03))



```

```{r Phenology canariensis_LW, include=FALSE}

##########PREGUNTA A RESPONDER: ¿Hay cambios en la temporalidad de inicio de los vasos de LW?
rm(modelo1, modelo2, modelo3, modelo4, modelo5, Qca_phenology_EW)
##modelos
Qca_phenology_LW <- split(Qca_phenology, Qca_phenology$Inicio_LW_bin )
Qca_phenology_LW <- rbind(Qca_phenology_LW$`0`, Qca_phenology_LW$`1`)############Elimino los NA de esta columna

##pasa lo mismo que en el apartado anterior pero con la particularidad de que ahora el r2 de los modelos genera issingular y que Conditional R2: 1.000 lo cual es imposible
##para responder la pregunta uso solo el modelo 5

# modelo1 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_LW, Inicio_LW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(H_.cm.) + scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.) + Tratam  + (1|indv), family = binomial) ##56.3
# modelo2 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_LW, Inicio_LW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.)+ Tratam  + (1|indv), family = binomial) ##54.3
# modelo3 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_LW, Inicio_LW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(H_.cm.)+ Tratam  + (1|indv), family = binomial) ##53.9
# modelo4 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_LW, Inicio_LW_bin ~ scale(date_1) + scale(H_.cm.)*scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.)+ Tratam  + (1|indv), family = binomial) ##58.7
modelo5 <- glmer(data = Qca_phenology_LW, Inicio_LW_bin ~ scale(date_1)+ Tratam  + (1|indv), family = binomial) #52.7

# model.sel(modelo1, modelo3, modelo4, modelo5) ###mejor modelo es el modelo 5


r2(modelo5) ##########esto no es normal que me salga issingular en el r2
summary(modelo5)
residuos <- residuals(modelo5)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)
hist(residuos) ###son normales

#####graficarlo

df$indv <- 2
predict_Ci <- predictInterval(modelo5,
                              newdata = df,
                              level = 0.95,
                              type = "probability",
                              stat = "mean")

df$fit <- predict_Ci$fit
df$upr <- predict_Ci$upr
df$lwr <- predict_Ci$lwr
plot_LWformation <-ggplot(data = df, aes(x = date_1, y=fit, colour = Tratam ))+
  geom_line(show.legend = F, lwd= 0.7)+
  geom_ribbon(data= df, alpha=.3, mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date_1), ymin= lwr, ymax= upr, fill=Tratam),colour= NA, show.legend = F)+
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(100,250), breaks = seq(from=40, to=250, by=20))+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
  labs( x= "DOY", y = "LW vessel formation probability")+
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limits = c(0,1.03))
plot_LWformation
# Día donde prob supera 0.5 = inicio estimado de EW
df$date_1 <- as.Date(df$date_1)
df$date_1[which.min(abs(df$fit -0.5))]


plot_grid(plot_EWformation,plot_LWformation, ncol = 2)
rm(modelo5, Qca_phenology_LW)
```

```{r Análisis de 2020/2021 Qca, include=FALSE}
## EW

###datos
EW <- list("Qc2.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$a2QcC4F21.csv[c(1,20), ],"Qc3.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$b3QcC_4F21.csv[c(32,44, 48,49), ], "Qc5.20" =Qca2020_21$Qca20$c5QcC4F21.csv[c(10,21,23,32,43,57,64), ], "Qc8.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$d8QcC4F21.csv[c(1,3,9,18), ],"Qc9.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$e9QcC4F21.csv[c(19), ],"Qc10.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$f10QcC4F21.csv[c(7,18), ],"Qc18.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$g18QcS4F21.csv[c(8), ],"Qc19.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$h19QcS4F21.csv[c(1,3), ],"Qc26.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$i26QcS4F21.csv[c(1,19,30,31), ],"Qc30.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$j30QcCSF21.csv[c(14,30,42, 51,57), ], "Qc40.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$k40QcC4F21.csv[c(1,8,27), ], "Qc44.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$l44QcC4F21.csv[c(7,12,20,26,29), ],"Qc47.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$m47QcS4F21.csv[c(1,2,12,13,42,43), ],"Qc52.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$n52QcS4F21.csv[c(4,6,25,27,31,33,37,38,44), ]) #####se hace una lista con todos los vasos de EW del año 2020

EW_21 <- list("Qc2.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$a2QcC19E22.csv[c(1,9,11,12,14,16,17,24,28,29,31,35,38,43,45), ],"Qc3.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$b3QcC19E22.csv[c(1,29,30,35,55,58,59), ], "Qc5.21" =Qca2020_21$Qca21$c5QcC19E22.csv[c(1,6,13,15,19,24,32,37,39,40), ], "Qc9.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$d9QcC19E22.csv[c(18,27), ],"Qc18.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$h18QcS19E22.csv[c(19,21,23,32,36), ],"Qc19.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$i19QcS19E22.csv[c(1,23,36), ],"Qc30.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$j30QcS19E22.csv[c(2,9,16,21,25), ], "Qc36.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$k36QcC19E22.csv[c(1,6), ], "Qc40.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$m40QcC19E22.csv[c(1,16,29), ], "Qc44.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$n44QcC19E22.csv[c(5,10,19,42), ],"Qc47.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$o47QcS19E22.csv[c(1,3,4), ],"Qc52.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$r52QcS19E22.csv[c(7,13,21,29), ]) #####se hace una lista con todos los vasos de EW del año 2021

LW <- list("Qc2.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$a2QcC4F21.csv[-c(1,2,3,5,7,20,8,13,19,10,25,30,36,39), ],"Qc3.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$b3QcC_4F21.csv[-c(32,44, 48,49,20,42,34,14,41,43,35), ], "Qc5.20" =Qca2020_21$Qca20$c5QcC4F21.csv[-c(10,21,23,32,43,57,64,57,62,60,38,50,53,20,25,35,54,63,58,52), ], "Qc8.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$d8QcC4F21.csv[-c(1,3,9,18), ],"Qc9.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$e9QcC4F21.csv[-c(4,7,19,33,38,48,51,55,54,56,20,14,8,10,12,16,25,20), ],"Qc10.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$f10QcC4F21.csv[-c(7,18), ],"Qc18.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$g18QcS4F21.csv[-c(8), ],"Qc19.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$h19QcS4F21.csv[-c(1,3), ],"Qc26.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$i26QcS4F21.csv[-c(1,19,30,31), ],"Qc30.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$j30QcCSF21.csv[-c(14,30,42, 51,57,20,34,40,52,49,53,56,58,41,38), ], "Qc40.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$k40QcC4F21.csv[-c(1,8,27), ], "Qc44.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$l44QcC4F21.csv[-c(7,12,20,26,29), ],"Qc47.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$m47QcS4F21.csv[-c(1,2,12,13,42,43), ],"Qc52.20" = Qca2020_21$Qca20$n52QcS4F21.csv[-c(4,6,25,27,31,33,37,38,44), ]) #####se hace una lista con todos los vasos menos los de EW del año 2020

LW_21 <- list("Qc2.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$a2QcC19E22.csv[-c(1,9,11,12,14,16,17,24,28,29,31,35,38,43,45), ],"Qc3.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$b3QcC19E22.csv[-c(1,18,19,23,29,30,35,40,46,49,51,53,55,58,59,20,24,2,5,28,42,32), ], "Qc5.21" =Qca2020_21$Qca21$c5QcC19E22.csv[-c(1,6,13,15,19,24,32,37,39,40), ], "Qc9.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$d9QcC19E22.csv[-c(18,27), ],"Qc10.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$e10QcC19E22.csv[-c(12,22,26,27,33), ],"Qc18.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$h18QcS19E22.csv[-c(19,21,23,32,36), ],"Qc19.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$i19QcS19E22.csv[-c(1,23,36), ],"Qc30.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$j30QcS19E22.csv[-c(2,9,16,21,25), ], "Qc36.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$k36QcC19E22.csv[-c(1,6), ], "Qc40.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$m40QcC19E22.csv[-c(1,16,29), ], "Qc44.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$n44QcC19E22.csv[-c(5,8,10,19,33,38,42,21,13,26,40,46), ],"Qc47.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$o47QcS19E22.csv[-c(1,3,4), ],"Qc52.21" = Qca2020_21$Qca21$r52QcS19E22.csv[-c(7,13,21,29), ]) #####se hace una lista con todos los vasos de EW del año 2021, ademas elimino los fallos que tiene en la lectura de algunos vasos de la LW

LW <- c(LW, LW_21)
EW <- c(EW, EW_21)
LW_EW <- list()
LW_EW$EW <- EW
LW_EW$LW <- LW
rm(EW_21, LW_21, LW, EW)
###le hago una columna con su indv y year

n <- 0
while (n < length(LW_EW)) {
  n <- n +1
  x <- 0
  while(x < length(LW_EW[[n]])){
  x <- x +1
  LW_EW[[n]][[x]]$indv <- names(LW_EW[[n]])[x]
  ifelse(unique(grepl("20", LW_EW[[n]][[x]]$indv)), LW_EW[[n]][[x]]$year <- 2020, LW_EW[[n]][[x]]$year <- 2021  )
  LW_EW[[n]][[x]]$N_vessels <- length( LW_EW[[n]][[x]]$Area)
} 
  
}

rm(x,n)

####escribo bien la columna de individuos y uno los dataframes de EW/LW
LW_EW <-lapply(LW_EW, function(x){
  x <- lapply(x, function(y){
    
    y$indv <- gsub( "Qc", "",
                   gsub( ".20", "",
                         gsub( ".21", "", as.character(y$indv))))
  y <- y[c("indv", 'Area', 'Feret', "year", "N_vessels")]
  return(y)
    })
   x <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, x)
   return(x)
  })

control <- c(2,3,5,8,9,10,36,40,44)

###clasifico por tratamiento y primera visualizacion
LW_EW <- lapply(LW_EW, function(x){
  x$indv <- as.numeric(x$indv)
###Separamos entre control y sequia

x$treatment <- ifelse(x$indv %in% control, "control", "drought" )
x$Area_Feret <- 0.785*(x$Feret^2)

print(ggplot(data =x, aes(x= treatment, y= Area_Feret))+
  geom_violin()+
  geom_point())
return(x)
})

#elimino los valores anomalos
LW_EW$LW$Area_Feret <- ifelse(LW_EW$LW$Area_Feret >= 10, NA, LW_EW$LW$Area_Feret)
##lo grafico
lapply(LW_EW, function(x){

print(ggplot(data =x, aes(x= treatment, y= Area_Feret))+
  geom_violin()+
  geom_point())

})

########genero la columna de plot
plot <- data.frame("indv"= Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Tree, "Plot" = Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Plot)
LW_EW <- lapply(LW_EW, function(x){ x <- merge(x, plot, by= c("indv"))
x$Plot <- as.factor(x$Plot)
return(x)
})

####modelos ###########siempre que añado Plot me genera isSingular


modelo_EW <- lmer(data = as.data.frame(LW_EW$EW) , log(Area_Feret) ~treatment +(1|indv)) ###le hago el logaritmo ya que los datos no son normales
summary(modelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamientosummary(modelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamientosummary(modelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamiento
residuos <- residuals(modelo_EW)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)
#######preguntar a ELI si lo hago con LMER o no #######################

aggregate(Area_Feret~ treatment,LW_EW$EW, mean )
aggregate(Area_Feret~ treatment,LW_EW$EW, se )

modelo_LW <- lmer(data = as.data.frame(LW_EW$LW) , log(Area_Feret) ~treatment + (1|indv)) ###le hago el logaritmo ya que los datos no son normales
summary(modelo_LW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamiento
residuos <- residuals(modelo_LW)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)

aggregate(Area_Feret~ treatment,LW_EW$LW, mean )
aggregate(Area_Feret~ treatment,LW_EW$LW, se )

###numero de EW vessel por indv en el area

#######tengo que juntar el area y dividirlo para saber la frecuencia de vasos de EW en el anillo

##data frame con el area del anillo
Minicore20_21 <- list("year20" = Minicore_fielddata$Minicore_TRW$`2Feb21`, "year21" = Minicore_fielddata$Minicore_TRW$`19Ene22`)
Minicore20_21 <- eliminar_filas_NA_lista(Minicore20_21, "N_vasos")
Minicore20_21$year20$year <- 2020
Minicore20_21$year21$year <- 2021
Minicore20_21 <- lapply(Minicore20_21, function(x){
  x$TRW_mean <- rowMeans(x[ ,names(x) %in% c("TRW (mm) arriba", "TRW (mm) centro", "TRW (mm) Abajo")], na.rm = T)
  x <- x[c("indv", 'year', 'Plot', "Area","TRW_mean")]
  return(x)
})
Minicore20_21 <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, Minicore20_21)


########uno los datos anteriores para saber la densidad de vasos

EW_LW_N_vessels <- lapply(LW_EW, function(x){
  x$indv_year <- paste(x$indv, "_", x$year)
x <-  x[!duplicated(x$indv_year), ]
x <- merge(x, Minicore20_21, by= c("year", "indv") )
x$area_TRW <- x$Area.y
x$vesseldensity <- x$N_vessels/x$area_TRW
print(ggplot(data =x, aes(x= as.factor(year), y= vesseldensity, fill= treatment))+
  geom_boxplot())
return(x)
})

  


modelo_EW <- lmer(data = as.data.frame(EW_LW_N_vessels$EW), log(vesseldensity) ~ treatment + (1|as.factor(EW_LW_N_vessels$EW$indv))) ###le hago el logaritmo ya que los datos no son normales

summary(modelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamientosummary(mPlotodelo_EW) ######no haysummary(modelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamientosummary(mPlotodelo_EW) ######no haysummary(modelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamientosummary(mPlotodelo_EW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamiento
residuos <- residuals(modelo_EW)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)

aggregate(vesseldensity~ treatment,EW_LW_N_vessels$EW, mean )
aggregate(vesseldensity~ treatment,EW_LW_N_vessels$EW, se )


###############¿hago de mas años?


modelo_LW<- lmer(data = as.data.frame(EW_LW_N_vessels$LW) , log(vesseldensity) ~ treatment + (1|as.factor(EW_LW_N_vessels$LW$indv))) ###le hago el logaritmo ya que los datos no son normales
summary(modelo_LW) ######no hay diferencia entre tratamiento
r2(modelo_LW)
########revisarrrrr con Eli

residuos <- residuals(modelo_LW)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)

aggregate(vesseldensity~ treatment,EW_LW_N_vessels$LW, mean )
aggregate(vesseldensity~ treatment,EW_LW_N_vessels$LW, se )



###TRW
Minicore20_21$treatment <- ifelse(Minicore20_21$indv %in% control, "control", "drought" )

ggplot(data = Minicore20_21, aes(x= treatment, y= TRW_mean ))+
  geom_boxplot()

summary(lmer(data = Minicore20_21, TRW_mean ~ treatment + year + (1|indv)))

aggregate(TRW_mean~ treatment + year,Minicore20_21, mean )
aggregate(TRW_mean~ treatment + year,Minicore20_21, se )


#DBH y H
Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie$Tratam <- ifelse(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie$indv %in% control, "control", "drought")

DBH_model <-  lm(data = as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie), `DBH_(cm)` ~ Tratam)
summary(DBH_model) ##no hay diferencias

H_model <- lm(data = as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie),  `H_(cm)` ~ Tratam)
summary(H_model) ##no hay diferencias

aggregate(`DBH_(cm)`~ Tratam, as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie), mean )
aggregate(`DBH_(cm)` ~ Tratam,as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie), se )
aggregate(`H_(cm)`~ Tratam, as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie), mean )
aggregate(`H_(cm)` ~ Tratam,as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie), se )

###ray area
Ray_area <- as.data.frame(Minicore_fielddata$Minicore_TRW$ray_area)

Ray_area <- Ray_area[!(is.na(Ray_area$Codigo) |Ray_area$Codigo == " ") ,  ] ###elimino las filas que no me afectan para este calculo

Ray_area <- pivot_longer(data = Ray_area, cols = c("Ray_2020", "Ray_2021"), names_to = "year", values_to = "Ray_area")

ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data = Ray_area, aes(x= Tratam, y= Ray_area))


ray_model <- lmer(data= Ray_area, Ray_area ~ Tratam + (1|Árbol)) #########esta bien el random?
summary(ray_model)
r2(ray_model)
########revisarrrrr con Eli

residuos <- residuals(ray_model)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)

aggregate(Ray_area~ Tratam, Ray_area, mean )
aggregate(Ray_area~ Tratam, Ray_area, se )


###EW vulnerability index

LW_EW_AQ <- lapply(LW_EW, function(x){
  x$Feret <- x$Feret*1000
  x$D5 <- x$Feret^5
  x$D4 <- x$Feret^4
  x$D4_metros <- x$D4/(10^24)
  x <- split(x, x$year) #########separo por año y por individuo
  x <- lapply(x, function(n){n <- split(n, n$indv)
  return(n)}) 

  x <- lapply(x, function(y){
    y <- lapply(y, function(z){
      z <- data.frame("indv" = unique(z$indv), "N_vessels" = unique(z$N_vessels), "totalvesselarea"= sum(z$Area_Feret), "sumD4"= sum(z$D4), "sumD5"= sum(z$D5), "sumD4_metros"= sum(z$D4_metros), "year"= unique(z$year), "treatment"= unique(z$treatment), "Dmin_microm" = min(z$Feret) )})
    return(y)
  })
  return(x)
}) ######calculo D4 y su suma en todos los casos que tengo de muestreo


LW_EW_AQ <- lapply(LW_EW_AQ, function(x){
  x <- lapply(x, function(y){
    y <- lapply(y, function(z){
      z <- merge(z, Minicore20_21, by= c("indv", "year", "treatment"))

      z <- data.frame("indv" = z$indv, "year" = z$year, "treatment"= z$treatment,"N_vessels"= z$N_vessels ,"totalvesselarea"= z$totalvesselarea, "meanvesselarea"= z$totalvesselarea/ z$N_vessels, "vesselfrequency"= z$N_vessels/ z$Area, "dh"= z$sumD5/z$sumD4, "Kh"= (((3.14*998.2071)/(128*0.001002))*z$sumD4_metros), "Totalringarea"= z$Area, "vulindex" = z$Dmin/z$N_vessels)
      z$Ks <- z$Kh/z$Totalringarea
      
      return(z)
    })
    return(y)
  })
  return(x)
}) ######calculo del dh, kh, ks, vessel frequency y meanvesselarea

LW_EW_AQ <- lapply(LW_EW_AQ, function(x){
  x <- lapply(x, function(y){y <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, y)
  return(y)} )
  x <- do.call(rbind.data.frame, x)
    
    return(x)
}) #####lo uno todo en un data frame

LW_EW_AQ$LW <- LW_EW_AQ$LW[complete.cases(LW_EW_AQ$LW), ]

ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$EW) , aes(x=as.factor(treatment), y= vulindex))
ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$LW) , aes(x=as.factor(treatment), y= vulindex))
ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$EW) , aes(x=as.factor(treatment), y=  Ks))
ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$LW) , aes(x=as.factor(treatment), y= Ks))
ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$EW) , aes(x=as.factor(treatment), y=  Kh))
ggplot()+ geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$LW) , aes(x=as.factor(treatment), y= Kh))

vulindex_model_EW <- lm(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$EW), log(vulindex) ~ treatment )
vulindex_model_LW <- lm(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$LW), log(vulindex) ~ treatment )
Ks_model_EW <- lm(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$EW), log(Ks) ~ treatment)
Ks_model_LW <- lm(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$LW), log(Ks) ~ treatment )
Kh_model_EW <- lm(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$EW), log(Kh) ~ treatment)
Kh_model_LW <- lm(data= as.data.frame(LW_EW_AQ$LW), log(Kh) ~ treatment)

summary(vulindex_model_EW)
summary(vulindex_model_LW)
summary(Ks_model_EW)
summary(Ks_model_LW)
summary(Kh_model_EW)
summary(Kh_model_LW)
residuos <- residuals(vulindex_model_EW)
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)

#####patogenos
Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora <- split(Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora, Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Species)
Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Alcornoque <- NULL

Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora <- data.frame("indv" = Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Quejigo$Tree, "Pci"= Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Quejigo$Pci2020, "treatment"= Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Quejigo$Drought, "Plot" = Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora$Quejigo$Block )
ggplot(data = Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora, aes(x=treatment, y=Pci))+ geom_point()

modelo_phytophthora <-  lmer(data = Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora, Pci ~ treatment+ (1|Plot)) ############tambien isSingular ¿lo dejo solo como lm?
summary(modelo_phytophthora)

####usar la distribucion binomial negativa  usando glmmTMB para comparar?¿ es lo que suele usar lorena
aggregate(Pci ~ treatment, Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora, mean )
aggregate(Pci ~ treatment, Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora, se )

```

```{r Diferencias TRW, include=FALSE}
###cojo los datos de TRW individual de cada fecha con el medio de cada fecha
TRW_2021 <- Minicore_fielddata$Minicore_TRW

#####elimino las diferentes listas que no me van a hacer falta
TRW_2021$`2Feb21` <- NULL
TRW_2021$`10AGOS_FENO` <- NULL
TRW_2021$ray_area <- NULL
TRW_2021$`18Marz2021` <- NULL

TRW_2021 <- eliminar_filas_NA_lista(TRW_2021, "TRW (mm) centro")

TRW_2021 <- lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
    x$TRW_mean <- rowMeans(x[ ,names(x) %in% c("TRW (mm) arriba", "TRW (mm) centro", "TRW (mm) Abajo")], na.rm = T)
  x <- data.frame("indv"= x$indv, 'Plot'= x$Plot,"TRW_mean"= x$TRW_mean, "TRW_2020"= x$`2020_TRW`)
  return(x)
})

fechas <- as.Date(c("01/04/21", "15/04/21", "29/04/21", "13/05/21", "27/05/21", "10/06/21", "22/07/21", "26/08/21", "09/09/21", "14/10/21", "18/11/21", "16/12/21", "19/01/22", "08/02/22"),format = "%d/%m/%y") 

#####le uno la fecha
x <- 0
while(x < length(TRW_2021)){
  x <- x+1
  TRW_2021[[x]]$date <- fechas[x]
  
}

TRW_2021 <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame, TRW_2021)) ####lo uno todo


# cargo los datos de patogenicidad

TRW_2021 <- merge(TRW_2021,Minicore_fielddata$phytophthora, by=c("indv", "indv"))
TRW_2021 <- merge(TRW_2021,Minicore_fielddata$Datos_pie, by=c("indv"))
TRW_2021 <- TRW_2021[!names(TRW_2021) %in% c("Plot.x", "Plot.y","Finca","Tratam","Especie","Árbol")]




####ahora calculo el TRW diario entre fechas
TRW_2021 <- split(TRW_2021, TRW_2021$indv)
diference_0 <- c(0)
#esta en mm, lo paso a microm
TRW_2021 <- lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
  x <-  x[order(x$date), ]
  
  ###diferencia entre fechas
  diference_0 <-  c(0) 
  diference_Date <- c(diference_0, diff.Date(x$date))
  x$diference_Date <- diference_Date
  
  ###proporcion con el 2020 con respecto a su fecha
  x$TRW_propTRW2021 <- (x$TRW_mean)/x$TRW_2020

  
  
  return(x)
}) ###proporcion TRW2021 con respecto al crecimiento 2020

###mirar out-values
lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
  ggplot(x, aes(x=date, y = TRW_propTRW2021))+
    geom_point()
})

##modifico los outvalue de elongacion
TRW_2021$`3`$TRW_propTRW2021[10] <- TRW_2021$`3`$TRW_propTRW2021[11]
TRW_2021$`5`$TRW_propTRW2021[6] <- TRW_2021$`5`$TRW_propTRW2021[8]
TRW_2021$`5`$TRW_propTRW2021[7] <- TRW_2021$`5`$TRW_propTRW2021[8]
TRW_2021$`18`$TRW_propTRW2021[10] <- TRW_2021$`5`$TRW_propTRW2021[11]
TRW_2021$`19`$TRW_propTRW2021[9] <- TRW_2021$`19`$TRW_propTRW2021[10]
TRW_2021$`19`$TRW_propTRW2021[13] <- TRW_2021$`19`$TRW_propTRW2021[12]
TRW_2021$`36`$TRW_propTRW2021[9] <- TRW_2021$`36`$TRW_propTRW2021[10]
TRW_2021$`40`$TRW_propTRW2021[6] <- TRW_2021$`40`$TRW_propTRW2021[7]
TRW_2021$`44`$TRW_propTRW2021[3] <- TRW_2021$`44`$TRW_propTRW2021[5]
TRW_2021$`44`$TRW_propTRW2021[4] <- TRW_2021$`44`$TRW_propTRW2021[5]
TRW_2021$`44`$TRW_propTRW2021[6] <- TRW_2021$`44`$TRW_propTRW2021[7]
TRW_2021$`47`$TRW_propTRW2021[9] <- TRW_2021$`47`$TRW_propTRW2021[10]
TRW_2021$`52`$TRW_propTRW2021[7] <- TRW_2021$`52`$TRW_propTRW2021[8]
lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
  ggplot(x, aes(x=date, y = TRW_propTRW2021))+
    geom_point()
})


TRW_2021 <- lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
  y <- 1
  x$TRW2021mod <- x$TRW_propTRW2021
  while(y < length(x$indv)){
    y <- y +1
    
    x$TRW2021mod[y] <- ifelse(x$TRW2021mod[y] < x$TRW2021mod[y - 1], x$TRW2021mod[y - 1], x$TRW2021mod[y])}
    return(x)
    }) #"TRW2021mod" corrijo todas las mediciones donde cuando se produce un "decrecimiento" lo asumo como una contracción de la madera, por lo cual lo sustituyo por el valor anterior mayor



TRW_2021 <- lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
  
  x$diference_TRW <- c(diference_0, diff(x$TRW2021mod))
  x$TRWday_micras <- (x$diference_TRW/x$diference_Date)*1000
  x$TRWday_micras[1] <- x$TRW2021mod[1]
  x$diference_TRW[1] <- x$TRW2021mod[1]
  x$TRWday_micras <- ifelse(x$TRWday_micras < 0, 0, x$TRWday_micras)
  ###creo la columna anterior con valores 0 crecimiento
  x <- rbind(x, x[rep(1,1), ])
  x <-  x[with(x, order(x$date)), ]
  x$date[1] <- as.Date("18-03-21", format= "%d-%m-%y")
  cols_to_zero <- setdiff(colnames(x), c("indv","date", "Pci", "treatment", "DBH_(cm)","H_(cm)","Diametro_copa_(cm)" ))
  x[x$date == as.Date("18-03-21", format= "%d-%m-%y"), cols_to_zero] <- 0
  x <- rbind(x, x[rep(1,1), ])
  x <-  x[with(x, order(x$date)), ]
  x$date[1] <- as.Date("01-03-21", format= "%d-%m-%y")
  return(x)
}) #####hago el incremento de TRW diario en micras y creo una fila con la fecha anterior con 0 en crecimiento


##hago el crecimiento estandarizado
TRW_2021 <- lapply(TRW_2021, function(x){
  x$TRWstandard <- x$TRW2021mod/x$TRW2021mod[length(x$TRW2021mod)]
  x$diference_TRWstandard <- c(diference_0, diff(x$TRWstandard))
  
  return(x)
})


###crecimiento diario estandarizado
 
TRW_2021 <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame, TRW_2021)) ####lo uno todo

TRW_2021$treatment <- ifelse(TRW_2021$indv %in% control, "control", "drought")


ggplot(TRW_2021, aes(x=date, y=diference_TRWstandard, colour = treatment))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth()+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("#1E90FF","#FF4040"))
ggplot(TRW_2021, aes(x=date, y=TRWstandard, colour = treatment))+
  geom_point()+
   scale_color_manual(values = c("#1E90FF","#FF4040"))+
  geom_smooth()


########modelos de crecimiento
TRW_2021$date_1 <- as.numeric(TRW_2021$date)
modelo1 <- gamm(
  log(diference_TRWstandard + 1) ~ treatment +
                  s( date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 1, by= as.factor(treatment)) +        # curvas temporal separadas por tratamiento
                  scale(Pci) +                       # efecto  lineal del patógeno
                  scale(H_.cm.) + scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.),           # covariables lineales
  random = list(indv = ~1),                       # interceptos aleatorios por árbol
  correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   # autocorrelación temporal por individuo
  data = TRW_2021,
  method = "REML")
modelo2 <- gamm(
  log(diference_TRWstandard + 1) ~ treatment +
                  s( date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 1, by= as.factor(treatment)) +        
                  scale(H_.cm.) + scale(Diametro_copa_.cm.),          
  random = list(indv = ~1),                       
  correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   
  data = TRW_2021,
  method = "REML")

modelo3 <- gamm(
  log(diference_TRWstandard + 1) ~ treatment +          
                  s( date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 1, by= as.factor(treatment)),      ####le puedo poner bs= "ts" para que empiece en y= 0, pero debe de tener m=10   
  random = list(indv = ~1),                       
  correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   
  data = TRW_2021,
  method = "REML")
modelo4 <- gamm(
  log(diference_TRWstandard + 1) ~ treatment +
                 s( date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 1, by= as.factor(treatment)) +       
                  scale(Pci),                    
  random = list(indv = ~1),                       
  correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   
  data = TRW_2021,
  method = "REML")


model.sel(modelo1$lme, modelo2$lme, modelo3$lme,modelo4$lme) ##mejor el modelo 4

residuos <- modelo3$lme$residuals
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)
hist(residuos) ###son normales

summary(modelo3$gam)



newdata <- data.frame(date_1=rep(seq(min(TRW_2021$date_1, na.rm=T),max(TRW_2021$date_1, na.rm=T),length.out = nrow(TRW_2021)), 2),
           treatment = rep(c("control", "drought"), each = nrow(TRW_2021)),
           indv = 5)

model_growth <- predict(modelo3, newdata, se.fit= T)
newdata$predict <- model_growth$fit
newdata$CI <- model_growth$se.fit

modelo_diference_TRWstandard <-  ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = TRW_2021, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y= log(diference_TRWstandard + 1), colour = treatment),alpha= 0.3, show.legend = F)+
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y=predict, colour = treatment), show.legend = F)+
  geom_ribbon(data = newdata, alpha=.4,mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date_1), ymin=predict-CI, ymax=predict+CI, fill=treatment), show.legend = F)+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limits = c(-0.05,0.57))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
  labs( x= "month", y = "Proportion of annual tree-ring formation")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")

modelo_diference_TRWstandard




modelo_diference_TRWstandard_1 <-  ggplot()+
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y=predict, colour = treatment))+
  geom_ribbon(data = newdata, alpha=.4,mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date_1), ymin=predict-CI, ymax=predict+CI, fill=treatment))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
   theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limits = c(-0.02,0.2))+
  labs( x= "month", y = "Proportion of annual tree-ring formation")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")


modelo_diference_TRWstandard
modelo_diference_TRWstandard_1
############grafica supporting ###############PREGUNTAR SI LO HAGO DE MANERA GOMPERZT PERO TENGO DUDA DE FALSEAR DATOS TRAS FEBRERO
modelo_crecimiento <- gamm(  TRWstandard ~ treatment +   
                  s( date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 5, by= as.factor(treatment)),      ####le puedo poner bs= "ts" para que empiece en y= 0, pero debe de tener m=10   
  random = list(indv = ~1),                       
  correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   
  data = TRW_2021,
  method = "REML")

modelo_crecimiento_indv <- gam(  TRWstandard ~ indv + s( date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 5, by= as.factor(indv)), data = TRW_2021,method = "REML")


###creo los datos para los predicts
newdata <- data.frame(date_1=rep(seq(min(TRW_2021$date_1, na.rm=T),max(TRW_2021$date_1, na.rm=T),length.out = nrow(TRW_2021)), 2),
           treatment = rep(c("control", "drought"), each = nrow(TRW_2021)),
           indv = 2)
indv <- unique(TRW_2021$indv)

x <- 0
newdata_indv <- list()
while(x < length(indv)){
  x <- x+1
  newdata_indv[[x]] <- data.frame(newdata, "indv" = indv[x])
}
newdata_indv <- lapply(newdata_indv, function(x){
  x$indv <- NULL
  x$treatment <- ifelse(x$treatment == "control", NA, x$treatment )
  x <- x[complete.cases(x$treatment), ]
  x$treatment <- NULL
  x$indv <- x$indv.1
  return(x)

})
newdata_indv <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame,newdata_indv))
model_growth_indv <- predict(modelo_crecimiento_indv, newdata_indv, se.fit= T)
newdata_indv$predict <- model_growth_indv$fit
newdata_indv$CI <- model_growth_indv$se.fit
newdata_indv$treatment <- ifelse(newdata_indv$indv %in% control, "control", "drought")


model_growth <- predict(modelo_crecimiento, newdata, se.fit= T)
newdata$predict <- model_growth$fit
newdata$CI <- model_growth$se.fit

modelo_TRWstandard <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = TRW_2021, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y= TRWstandard, colour = treatment),alpha= 0.3, show.legend = F)+
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y=predict, colour = treatment))+
  geom_ribbon(data = newdata, alpha=.4,mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date_1), ymin=predict-CI, ymax=predict+CI, fill=treatment))+ scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
   theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limits = c(-0.1,1.1))+
  labs( x= "month", y = "Intra-annual progress of tree-ring formation")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")

modelo_TRWstandard_1 <- ggplot()+
   geom_line(data = newdata_indv , aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y= as.numeric(predict), colour = treatment,
                                       group = interaction(as.factor(indv), treatment)), alpha = 0.4, lwd= 0.7)+
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y=predict, colour = treatment), lwd= 1.5)+ 
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
   theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0,0), limits = c(-0.1,1.1))+
  labs( x= "month", y = "Intra-annual progress of tree-ring formation")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")




plot_grid(modelo_TRWstandard,modelo_diference_TRWstandard,modelo_TRWstandard_1, modelo_diference_TRWstandard_1, ncol = 2)
###test de bimodalidad (no lo parece) ###hay pico de crecimiento en control pero no en sequia



der_control <- derivatives(
  modelo3$gam,
  term = "s(date_1):as.factor(treatment)control")
der_sequia <- derivatives(
  modelo3$gam,
  term = "s(date_1):as.factor(treatment)drought")

der_control$sing <-  ifelse(der_control$.derivative <0, -1, 1)
der_sequia$sing <-  ifelse(der_sequia$.derivative <0, -1, 1)

der_treatment <- list("der_control" = der_control, "der_sequia"= der_sequia )

lapply(der_treatment, function(x){
  ggplot(as.data.frame(x), aes(x=date_1, y= sing))+
    geom_point()
  
})

###prueba con crecimiento observado sin estandarizar
# modelo_crecimiento <- gamm(
#   TRWday_micras ~ treatment +          
#                   s( date_1, k= 13, bs= "ts", m= 5, by= as.factor(treatment)),      ####le puedo poner bs= "ts" para que empiece en y= 0, pero debe de tener m=10   
#   random = list(indv = ~1),                       
#   correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   
#   data = TRW_2021,
#   method = "REML")
# 
# 
# 
# newdata <- data.frame(date_1=rep(seq(min(TRW_2021$date_1, na.rm=T),max(TRW_2021$date_1, na.rm=T),length.out = nrow(TRW_2021)), 2),
#            treatment = rep(c("control", "drought"), each = nrow(TRW_2021)),
#            indv = 2)
# 
# model_growth <- predict(modelo_crecimiento, newdata, se.fit= T)
# newdata$predict <- model_growth$fit
# newdata$CI <- model_growth$se.fit
# 
# 
# ggplot()+
#   geom_point(data = TRW_2021, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y= TRWday_micras, colour = treatment))+
#   geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x= as.Date(date_1), y=predict, colour = treatment))+
#   geom_ribbon(data = newdata, alpha=.4,mapping = aes(x=as.Date(date_1), ymin=predict-CI, ymax=predict+CI, fill=treatment))+
#     scale_color_manual(values = c("#1E90FF","#FF4040"))+
#   scale_fill_manual(values = c("#97FFFF","#FF6A6A"))+
#   theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
#           axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
#           axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
#         axis.text = element_text(color = "black",size = 12),
#         axis.ticks.length  = unit(0.1, "cm"))+
#   geom_hline(yintercept= 0)


rm(der_control, der_sequia, modelo1, modelo2, modelo3, modelo4, modelo_crecimiento, newdata, newdata_indv, df, der_treatment)

```

```{r veo cuanto y cuando ha crecido los indv por fecha, include=FALSE}
# ###lo hago previo para poder escoger los vasos y el area nuevo
# ver_crecimiento <- data.frame(indv= TRW_2021$indv,  date = TRW_2021$date, TRW_2021 = TRW_2021$TRW_mean, TRW_2020 = TRW_2021$TRW_2020,diference_TRW= TRW_2021$diference_TRW, TRWday_micras= TRW_2021$TRWday_micras)
# 
# ver_crecimiento$TRWday_micras <-  ifelse(ver_crecimiento$TRWday_micras == 0, NA, ver_crecimiento$TRWday_micras)
# 
# ver_crecimiento <- ver_crecimiento[complete.cases(ver_crecimiento$TRWday_micras), ]
# 
# ver_crecimiento$TRWdiffcorr <- ver_crecimiento$diference_TRW* ver_crecimiento$TRW_2020
# 
# split(ver_crecimiento, ver_crecimiento$indv)

```

```{r cargar todos los Cortes_Qca, include=FALSE}
####1-ABRIL-2021
# paths <- c("C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/c1-4-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/d15-4-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/e29-4-2021","C:/minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/n13-5-21", "C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/o27-5-21",      "C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/f10-6-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/g22-7-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/h9-9-2021",
#            "C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/i14-10-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/j18-11-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/K16-12-2021","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/l19-1-2022","C:/Minicores/Qca_Bruto/ImageJ/Tablas/m8-2-2022")
# 
# fechas <- c("1-4-21", "15-4-21","29-4-21","13-5-21","27-5-21","10-6-21","22-7-21","9-9-21","14-10-21","18-11-21","16-12-21","19-1-22","8-2-22")

# vessel_imageJ <- list()

# vessel_imageJ <- lapply(vessel_imageJ, function(x){

```

```{r Nuevos vasos por fecha, include=FALSE}
###PREGUNTA: ¿ LOS VASOS VARÍAN ENTRE TRATAMIENTO EN LAS FECHAS? // ¿HAY DIFERENCIAS HIDRAULICAS Y DENSIDAD DE VASOS A LO LARGO DEL TIEMPO?

new_vess$newvess$Area_microm <- 0.785*(new_vess$newvess$Feret_microm^2)
vessel <- new_vess$newvess
vessel$treatment <- ifelse(vessel$indv %in% control, "control", "drought")
vessel$treatment <- ifelse(vessel$indv == 2 & vessel$date == as.Date("2021-04-15"), NA , vessel$treatment)
vessel <- vessel[complete.cases(vessel), ]


vessel_1 <- vessel

 ggplot(vessel_1, aes(x= as.factor(date), y= Area_microm, fill= as.factor(treatment)))+
           geom_boxplot(show.legend = F)+
  theme_classic()+
  ylab("area por vaso (micromm^2)")+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040'))


# ###ver donde hay cambios significativos
library(emmeans)
library(multcompView)
library(multcomp)

qqnorm(log(vessel_1$Area_microm))
qqline(log(vessel_1$Area_microm))
 
vessel_1_aov <- split(vessel_1, vessel_1$date)
vessel_1_aov$`2021-11-18` <- NULL
vessel_1_aov$`2021-10-14` <- NULL
lapply(vessel_1_aov, function(x){
  areanewvess_mod <- lm(data = x, log(Area_microm) ~ treatment + (1|indv))
  summary(areanewvess_mod)
# areanewvess_mod <- emmeans(areanewvess_mod, ~ treatment)
#  pairs(areanewvess_mod, adjust = "tukey")

})

###hago plot

vessel_1$EW_LW <- ifelse(vessel_1$date <=  as.Date("2021-05-27"), "EW", "LW" )
vessel_1 <- split(vessel_1 , vessel_1$EW_LW )


meanvesselarea_plot <- ggplot()+
 geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(vessel_1$EW), aes(x= as.factor(date), y= Area_microm/1000000, fill= as.factor(treatment)), show.legend = F)+
  geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(vessel_1$LW), aes(x= as.factor(date), y= (Area_microm/1000000)*10, fill= as.factor(treatment)), show.legend = F)+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black",size = 12),
        axis.ticks.length  = unit(0.1, "cm"))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
  xlab("date")+
  scale_y_continuous(
name = "area por vaso (mm^2)",
sec.axis = sec_axis(~ ./10, name = "area por vaso (mm^2)")
)



  ####parametros hidraulicos
  vessel$D5 <- vessel$Feret_microm^5
  vessel$D4 <- vessel$Feret_microm^4
  vessel$D4_metros <- vessel$Feret_microm/(10^24)
  vessel <- split(vessel, vessel$date) #########separo por fecha e individuo
  vessel <- lapply(vessel, function(n){n <- split(n, n$indv)})

vessel <- lapply(vessel, function(y){
    y <- lapply(y, function(z){
      z <- data.frame("indv" = unique(z$indv), "N_vessels" = length(z$N_vessel), "totalvesselarea"= sum(z$Area_microm), "sumD4"= sum(z$D4), "sumD5"= sum(z$D5), "sumD4_metros"= sum(z$D4_metros), "date"= unique(z$date), "Dmin_microm" = min(z$Feret_microm), "Dmean_microm" = mean(z$Feret_microm) )})
    return(y)
  }) ######calculo D4 y su suma en todos los casos que tengo de muestreo

###uno el area y calculo los diferentes parametros hidraulicos
# https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2022.795941 sacado de aqui
vessel <- lapply(vessel, function(x){
  x <- lapply(x, function(y){
    area21 <- split(Minicore20_21, Minicore20_21$year)
    area21 <- area21$"2021"
      y <- merge(y, new_vess$newarea, by= c("indv", "date"))
      y$new_Areamm <- y$new_Areamicromcuad/1000000
      y <- merge(y, area21, by= c("indv"))
      

      y <- data.frame("indv" = y$indv, "date" = y$date,"N_vessels"= y$N_vessels ,"sumD4_metros" = y$sumD4_metros, "sumD4"= y$sumD4,"totalvesselarea"= y$totalvesselarea, "meanvesselarea"= y$totalvesselarea/ y$N_vessels, "vesselfrequency"= y$N_vessels/(y$new_Areamm), "Totalnewareamm"= y$new_Areamm, "Total_ringarea" = y$Area, "vulindex" = y$Dmean_microm/y$N_vessels)
      y$Dh <- ((y$sumD4^4)/y$N_vessels)^(1/4)
      y$Kh= (((3.14*998.2071)/(128*0.001002))*y$vesselfrequency*y$Dh)
      y$Ks <- y$Kh/y$Total_ringarea

    return(y)
  })
  x <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame, x ))
  return(x)
}) ######calculo del dh, kh, ks, vessel density y meanvesselarea 

vessel <- do.call(rbind, Map(data.frame, vessel))

vessel$treatment <- ifelse(vessel$indv %in% control, "control", "drought")

vessel$treatment <- ifelse(vessel$indv == 2 & vessel$date == as.Date("2021-04-15"), NA , vessel$treatment)
vessel <- vessel[complete.cases(vessel), ]

ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(data = vessel, aes(x= as.factor(date), y= Ks, fill= treatment))+
  geom_point(data = vessel, aes(x= as.factor(date), y= Ks, colour = treatment), position = "dodge")


###ver como se comporta veesel density a lo largo del tiempo y modelo
vessel$date_1 <- as.numeric(vessel$date)

veseldensity_model <- gamm(  vesselfrequency ~ treatment +   
                  s(date_1, k= 10, bs= "ts", m= 1, by= as.factor(treatment)),      ####le puedo poner bs= "ts" para que empiece en y= 0, pero debe de tener m=10   
  random = list(indv = ~1),                       
  correlation = corAR1(form = ~ date_1 | indv),   
  data = vessel,
  method = "REML")

summary(veseldensity_model$gam)
residuos <- veseldensity_model$lme$residuals
qqnorm(residuos)
qqline(residuos)




######plot vessel density
newdata <- data.frame(date_1=rep(vessel$date_1, 2),
           treatment = rep(c("control", "drought"), each = nrow(vessel)),
           indv = 5)

model_growth <- predict(veseldensity_model, newdata, se.fit= T)
newdata$predict <- model_growth$fit
newdata$CI <- model_growth$se.fit
dates <- data.frame("date_1" = vessel$date_1, "date" = vessel$date)
newdata <- merge(dates, newdata, by= "date_1")


vessel_densityplot <- ggplot()+
  geom_point(data = vessel, aes(x= date, y= vesselfrequency, colour = treatment),alpha= 0.3, show.legend = F)+
  geom_line(data = newdata, aes(x= date, y=predict, colour = treatment), show.legend = F)+
  geom_ribbon(data = newdata, alpha=.4,mapping = aes(x= date, ymin=predict-CI, ymax=predict+CI, fill=treatment), show.legend = F)+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text=element_text(size=12, colour = "black"),
        axis.title=element_text(size=14))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#0000FF",'#CD3333'))+
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#00EEEE",'#FF4040')) +
  labs( x= "month", y = "vessel density (nº vessel/mm^2)")+
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month" ,date_labels = "%m")

plot_grid(modelo_diference_TRWstandard,vessel_densityplot, ncol = 1 )
######plot de ks

vessel$EW_LW <- ifelse(vessel$date <=  as.Date("2021-05-27"), "EW", "LW" )
vessel <- split(vessel , vessel$EW_LW )

vessel$LW$Ks <- ifelse(vessel$LW$date == as.Date("2021-07-22") & vessel$LW$indv == 10, NA, vessel$LW$Ks)


Ks_perdate <- ggplot()+
  geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(vessel$EW), aes(x= as.factor(date), y= Ks, fill= as.factor(treatment)), show.legend = F)+
  geom_boxplot(data= as.data.frame(vessel$LW), aes(x= as.factor(date), y= (Ks*10), fill= as.factor(treatment)), show.legend = F)+
  theme(panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
          axis.line.x = element_line(colour="black"),
          axis.line.y = element_line(colour="black"),
        axis.text = element_text(color = "black",size = 12),
        axis.ticks.length  = unit(0.1, "cm"))+
  scale_y_continuous(
name = "Ks (ver unidades)",
sec.axis = sec_axis(~ ./10, name = "Ks (ver unidades)")
)+
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#00EEEE","#FF4040"))


plot_grid(meanvesselarea_plot,Ks_perdate, ncol = 1 )

```
